framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.path: Ship your own interface in production code
paths.what_it_is: Design and implement the UI yourself in the actual codebase, owning components live in production rather than handing off static files to an engineer.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can own a UI live in production code, not just hand off static files and hope the implementation matches the intent.

paths.path: Own and scale a documented design system
paths.what_it_is: Build a versioned, documented component system that other teams design and build against, and keep it alive as the organization grows.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can build a component system disciplined enough for other teams to design and build against, and keep it alive as the organization grows.

paths.path: Specialize in motion and interaction craft
paths.what_it_is: Go deep on animation and micro-interaction design - timing, easing, physics - as a specialty rather than a finishing touch applied at the end.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves deep, deliberate command of timing and interaction feel — a specialty distinct from treating animation as a last-minute polish pass.
